# Minimal subset of Incus metrics used by sandbox monitor unit tests.

incus_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="0",mode="system",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 1
incus_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="0",mode="user",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 2
incus_cpu_seconds_total{cpu="0",mode="system",name="sb2",project="default",type="container"} 0.5

incus_memory_Active_bytes{name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 100
incus_memory_Inactive_bytes{name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 200

incus_network_receive_bytes_total{device="lo",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 999
incus_network_receive_bytes_total{device="eth0",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 1000
incus_network_transmit_bytes_total{device="eth0",name="sb1",project="default",type="container"} 2000
